pi_items.source: Code verification: setup_task.sh line 43 sets GUEST_URL with userInfo.displayName=%22Keynote%20Speaker%22; task.json description confirms 'Locate the participant named Keynote Speaker'
Code verification: setup_task.sh lines 27, 43, 64 all reference AnnualTownHall; task.json description states 'moderating the AnnualTownHall meeting'; Jitsi room is created by URL path /AnnualTownHall
Code verification: task_utils.sh line 4 defines default JITSI_BASE_URL as http://localhost:8080; setup_task.sh confirms service runs at this address; all task scripts use this URL

privileged_info_summary: The pin_participant task uses a synthetic Jitsi Meet environment running at http://localhost:8080. The test scenario involves pinning a participant named 'Keynote Speaker' in a meeting room called 'AnnualTownHall'. All configuration values are generic test values with no actual personally identifiable information. The task setup generates synthetic participant data on-the-fly during test initialization.
